name: USS Howard W. Gilmore (AS 16)
events: 13 Nov 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Majuro. She was taken in hand for refit by a relief crew from Submarine Division 221 and USS USS Howard W. Gilmore (T/Capt. D.N. Cone, Jr., USN).
During the refit USS Icefish was also docked to repair the damage sustained in the depth charge attack on 26 October 1944. (2)

10 Dec 1944 Around 1345 M/10, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Majuro. She was escorted in by USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) which had joined around 0945 M/10.
She was taken in hand for refit by USS USS Howard W. Gilmore (T/Capt. D.N. Cone, Jr., USN). Refit was completed on 25 December 1944. (3)

14 Sep 1945 The submarine tender USS USS Howard W. Gilmore (T/Cdr. C.A. Johnson, USN) and the submarines USS Puffer (T/Lt.Cdr. C.R. Dwyer, USN), USS Rasher (T/Lt.Cdr. C.D. Nace, USN), USS Raton (T/Lt.Cdr. G.F. Gugliotta, USN), USS Baya (T/Lt.Cdr. B.C. Jarvis, USN), USS Becuna (T/Lt.Cdr. W.J. Bush, USN), USS Caiman (T/Cdr. W.L. Fey, Jr., USN), USS Capitaine (T/Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN), USS Carbonero (T/Cdr. C.L. Murphy, USN), USS Entemedor (T/Cdr. W.R. Smith, Jr., USN), USS Hardhead (T/Lt.Cdr. J.L. Haines, USN), USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. W. Scanland, Jr., USN), USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN), USS Lamprey (T/Lt.Cdr. L.B. McDonald, USN), USS Lizardfish (T/Cdr. O.M. Butler, USN) and USS Loggerhead (T/Cdr. R.N. Metcalf, USN) arrived at Pearl Harbor from Subic Bay.
